name: Ginger-Garlic Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 Cooked potatoes, peeled and cut into 3/4 inch dice
1 Fresh ginger, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the water and spices (except fennel seeds) into a paste.
2. Heat oil in a pan (a wok works well). When hot, add the fennel seeds.
3. Add the paste to the pan and fry for a few minutes without stirring too much.
4. Add the potatoes and fry until they are encrusted with the paste.
5. The potatoes can also be cooked using other methods such as making hash browns, boiling, steaming, baking, mashing, etc.
This is one of the best potato recipes ever according to Madhur Jaffrey. Exact measurements are provided.
